pages.text:
BUSBAR INSULATION TUBING (BBIT)
VOLTAGE CLASS 36 kV, APPLICATION Ø 11-125 MM
KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem BBIT thick-wall, heat shrink
tubing provides insulation enhancement and protection
• Exceptional insulation and long
against flashover and accidentally induced discharge.
term relia bility even at high
Particularly useful in con fined spaces, TE’s Raychem BBIT
continuous operating temperatures
tubing can be used on both circular and rectangular copper or
• Suitable for indoor and outdoor use aluminium busbars.
• Excellent anti-tracking properties On application of heat, the tubing shrinks snugly over the
busbar profile ensuring that the required minimum wall
• Flame retardant and halogen-free thickness is obtained. The BBIT tubing can be installed easily
during large scale production using an oven or in the field
• Good thermal emissivity
using a gas torch or hot air. The BBIT tubing is manufactured
from a halogen-free based polymer which has excellent
• Long shelf life and can be stored
performance in high voltage environments and reduces the
at temperatures up to 50°C
noxious and corrosive effects in fire situations.
without loss of performance
The use of the BBIT tubing allows equipment designers the
• REACH and RoHS compliant
freedom to reduce air spacing between busbars such as in
• UL approved the manufacture of switchgear cabinets where space is at a
premium. The BBIT tubing provides flashover protection up to
36 kV.
Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s
proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support.
ENERGY /// BUSBAR INSULATION TUBING (BBIT)

images.context_text: BUSBAR INSULATION TUBING (BBIT) VOLTAGE CLASS 36 kV, APPLICATION Ø 11-125 MM KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem BBIT thick-wall, heat shrink tubing provides insulation enhancement and protection • Exceptional insulation and long against flashover and accidentally induced discharge. term relia bility even at high Particularly useful in con fined spaces, TE’s Raychem BBIT continuous operating temperatures tubing can be used on both circular and rectangular copper or • Suitable for indoor and outdoor use aluminium busbars. • Excellent anti-tracking properties On application of heat, the tubing shrinks snugly over the busbar profile ensuring that the required minimum wall • Flame retardant and halogen-free thickness is obtained. The BBIT tubing can be installed easily during large scale production using an oven or in the field • Good thermal emissivity using a gas torch or hot air. The BBIT tubing is manufactured from a halogen-free based polymer which has excellent • Long shelf life and can be stored performance in high voltage environments and reduces the at temperatures up to 50°C noxious and corrosive effects in fire situations. without loss of performance The use of the BBIT tubing allows equipment designers the • REACH and RoHS compliant freedom to reduce air spacing between busbars such as in • UL approved the manufacture of switchgear cabinets where space is at a premium. The BBIT tubing provides flashover protection up to 36 kV. Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support. BUSBAR INSULATION TUBING (BBIT) VOLTAGE CLASS 36 kV, APPLICATION Ø 11-125 MM KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem BBIT thick-wall, heat shrink tubing provides insulation enhancement and protection • Exceptional insulation and long against flashover and accidentally induced discharge. term relia bility even at high Particularly useful in con fined spaces, TE’s Raychem BBIT continuous operating temperatures tubing can be used on both circular and rectangular copper or • Suitable for indoor and outdoor use aluminium busbars. • Excellent anti-tracking properties On application of heat, the tubing shrinks snugly over the busbar profile ensuring that the required minimum wall • Flame retardant and halogen-free thickness is obtained. The BBIT tubing can be installed easily during large scale production using an oven or in the field • Good thermal emissivity using a gas torch or hot air. The BBIT tubing is manufactured from a halogen-free based polymer which has excellent • Long shelf life and can be stored performance in high voltage environments and reduces the at temperatures up to 50°C noxious and corrosive effects in fire situations. without loss of performance The use of the BBIT tubing allows equipment designers the • REACH and RoHS compliant freedom to reduce air spacing between busbars such as in • UL approved the manufacture of switchgear cabinets where space is at a premium. The BBIT tubing provides flashover protection up to 36 kV. Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support. pages.text:
Busbar Insulation Tubing (BBIT)
TE’s wildlife and asset protection products and systems of tubes, tapes,
sheets, pre-formed covers and barriers provide a proven, cost-effective
and easy-to-install solution to bird, animal and weather related outages.
CLEARANCE REDUCTION
The tables indicate the clear ance reductions which are possible using TE’s Raychem BBIT tubing.
These are derived from BIL, AC withstand, DC withstand and discharge extinction tests.
These clearances should not be adopted without testing by the user. Sharp electrodes and unusual
geometries may require wider clearances.
